nasb.text: Then Jeremiah said to Seraiah, “As soon as you come to Babylon, then see that you read all these words aloud,

esv.text: And Jeremiah said to Seraiah: “When you come to Babylon, see that you read all these words,

cnv.text: 耶利米對西萊雅說：“你到了巴比倫以後，一定要宣讀這一切話，

ccb.text: 耶利米对西莱雅说：“你到巴比伦后要大声宣读这卷轴上的一切话，
